layout_and_spacing.philosophy: The Control Room Grid. Dense, structured, function-first layout prioritizing scanability.
layout_and_spacing.app_layout: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-white text-black
layout_and_spacing.sidebar_left: w-72 border-r border-border flex flex-col bg-[#F9FAFB]
layout_and_spacing.main_center: flex-1 border-r border-border flex flex-col bg-white min-w-[400px]
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Strict adherence to p-4 and p-6 for panel padding. Use gap-4 for internal component spacing.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px solid borders (border-border) to define all regions. Use rounded-none for sharp brutalist aesthetic.

project_creation_wizard.design: Centered box, stark white, heavy shadow (shadow-2xl), 1px solid border. Minimalist input for AI prompt with a prominent 'Generate' button (Klein Blue background).
project_creation_wizard.interaction: Typing effect or loading state while AI generates project skeleton.

multi_agent_visualization.design: 3 distinct card segments (flex items) in a row with borders between them. Each representing an agent (Governor, Creator, Launcher). Display icon, name, and status dot.
multi_agent_visualization.states: Idle (Grey dot), Thinking (Yellow pulsing dot), Working (Blue pulsing dot), Done (Green dot).

activity_feed.design: Terminal-like but clean. Use JetBrains Mono font. Timestamps on the left. Messages color-coded by agent or log type (info, error, success).
activity_feed.interaction: Auto-scroll to bottom. Sticky headers for dates/phases.

timeline_stepper.design: Connected vertical lines. Active step highlighted in Klein Blue, completed steps in Green. Shows progression: Planning -> Code Gen -> Review -> Deployment.

artifact_viewer.design: Tabs for 'Live Preview', 'Code/Artifacts', 'Logs'. 'Code' view should resemble an IDE (monaco-like, syntax highlighting). 'Live Preview' is a mock browser frame with a top bar.

surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift and shadow-sm.
surfaces.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002FA7]/90. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-black hover:bg-surface.

motion.tabs: Instant switch, no sliding animations to maintain functional crispness.

icons.usage: Use Brain for Governor, TerminalSquare for Creator, Rocket for Launcher. Stroke width 1.5 for crispness.

images.description: Clean white abstract architecture to be used at low opacity (10%) or overlaid with white background as a subtle textured backdrop for the Project Creation wizard.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for standard text. Klein blue (#002FA7) on white exceeds this.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have clear focus rings.
accessibility.test_ids: Required on all buttons, tabs, input fields, and feed items (e.g., data-testid='governor-status', data-testid='activity-feed-item').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react if not already present.
Override default shadcn component radii to rounded-none for the Swiss brutalist look.
The layout must fill the viewport exactly (100vh) without page scrolling; only the internal panes (Activity Feed, Artifact Viewer, Sidebar) should overflow-y-auto.
Implement the agent simulation logic using React state and useEffect with setTimeout to mock real-time progression through the timeline phases after project creation.
Ensure the Right Pane's 'Live Preview' tab contains a mock iframe or stylized div resembling a rendered application.
